calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-11-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Ryan Ardi, Esq., QUILL & ARROW LLP (310) 933-4271 rardi@quillarrowlaw.com Attorney for Plaintiffs, EDELSYS CODORNIU HERNANDEZ AND PAVEL RODRIGUEZ
Ali Ameripour, Esq., THETA LAW FIRM, LLP (424) 297-3103 eservice@thetafirm.com Attorney for defendant Hyundai Motor America

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay is denied.

(see word minutes for complete ruling)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
